name: Opole

# Opole ### OPL · v0.2.0 Part of the [EU Map Pack](https://ahkimn.github.io/subwaybuilder-eu-maps). ## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, each carrying a per-building foundation depth in in-game meters. Depths scale with building height and footprint width and are bounded to the **−10 m** to **−80 m** range: single-family homes and low-rise structures anchor at the floor, while supertall towers with deep bedrock piles (Taipei-101 class) reach the cap. Freestanding towers, masts, chimneys, and other slender non-occupiable structures are detected by shape and floored to the **−10 m** minimum. Foundation depths drive underground tunnel-clearance collision and are also emitted as a visual `foundations` pmtiles layer visible on the in-game map. Building geometry comes from BDOT10k with the Overture Maps Foundation footprint side-channel as the height fallback. - **Water Depth Index** — A water depth index restricts track placement in water bodies. Coastal bundles include a real bathymetric layer derived from EMODnet Bathymetry (1/16 arc-min DTM, ~115 m resolution); inland water (rivers, lakes, canals) uses a flat **−5 m** index that prevents surface-level track placement. - **Ocean Foundations** — A depth-colored ocean floor layer is included for coastal bundles, providing a visual representation of Baltic Sea bathymetry visible on the in-game map. - **Place Name Labels** — Two layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Major Polish cities at the metropolitan scale (gminy miejskie within Functional Urban Areas). - _Municipality labels_ — Names of all gminy within the map boundary. ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Polish government census and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _rejon statystyczny_ (sub-municipal census unit, BREC) using population-weighted centroids derived from a hybrid 125 m / 250 m / 1 km mesh — GUS NSP 2021 published gridded population at native resolution where available, and a GHS-POP 100 m raster (JRC R2023A) gated by a BDOT10k residential building mask in dense urban tiles. **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving NSP 2021 (_Narodowy Spis Powszechny 2021_) per-rejon population totals. **Aggregation:** A global scaling factor reconciles the mismatch between boundary-captured employed residents (from NSP 2021) and workplace employees, since commuters cross the FUA boundary in both directions. The per-gmina workplace control total uses the broader NSP 2021 census _pracujący_ (an ILO-style residence-side measure, GUS subject P4408), which captures sub-1 ha farmers and ≤9-employee agricultural entities that the narrower BDL administrative measure used previously excluded. **Commute Assignment:** Commute flows are assigned using a gravity model with distance-decay. Per-gmina origin-destination targets are taken from the GUS NSP 2021 commuter matrix; an iterative calibration loop adjusts gmina-pair multipliers until simulated commute shares converge to the observed flows. A symmetric cordon pass de-conflates the boundary self-loop; cross-boundary flows that a in-boundary only matrix would otherwise have collapsed onto a boundary gmina's diagonal are redistributed across in-bundle gminas via a mass-conserving multinomial weighted by gravity × in-bundle capacity, with the corresponding fabricated diagonal debited at the origin. **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, passenger-ferry terminals, universities, hospitals, military installations, tourism attractions, sports leagues, theatres, and convention centers — are injected as an additive layer. **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Polish government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. ### Census & Demographics - **2021 Census** (_Narodowy Spis Powszechny Ludności i Mieszkań 2021_ / NSP 2021 — per-municipality and per-rejon population, employment, and demographics) — [GUS / Statistics Poland](https://stat.gov.pl/) - **Per-rejon Census Population** (sub-municipal _rejon statystyczny_ / _obwód spisowy_ census-unit population) — [GUS NSP 2021](https://stat.gov.pl/) - **Commute O/D at gmina level** (per-gmina residence × workplace commuter flow matrix) — [GUS NSP 2021](https://stat.gov.pl/) - **Workplace Employment Statistics** (per-municipality workplace control total — primary: GUS NSP 2021 census _pracujący_ at subject P4408, an ILO-style residence-side measure; secondary / sectoral breakdown: GUS BDL workplace-employment statistics broken down by industry section) — [GUS NSP 2021](https://stat.gov.pl/) · [GUS BDL](https://bdl.stat.gov.pl/) - **Sub-gmina commute surveys** (per-rejon residence × workplace cross-tabulations from Warsaw and Wrocław city travel-behaviour surveys, where available) — [Warsaw](https://transport.um.warszawa.pl/) · [Wrocław](https://www.wroclaw.pl/) ### Geospatial Reference - **100 m Population Grid** (GHS-POP R2023A) — [JRC / EU Copernicus](https://ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu/) - **Administrative Boundaries** (PRG _Państwowy Rejestr Granic_ — gminy + powiaty + województwa) — [GUGiK](https://www.gugik.gov.pl/) - **BREC Rejon Polygons** (_rejon statystyczny / obwód spisowy_ census units) — [GUS INSPIRE](https://geo.stat.gov.pl/) - **Building Polygons & Use Classification** (BDOT10k — per-building footprint with use classification and floor count) — [GUGiK](https://www.geoportal.gov.pl/) - **Functional Urban Area Boundaries** (Eurostat URAU FUA polygons, gmina-aggregated) — [Eurostat GISCO](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/web/gisco) + [GUS TERCET](https://stat.gov.pl/) - **Bathymetry** (EMODnet Bathymetry DTM, ~115 m resolution — coastal bundles only) — [EMODnet Bathymetry Consortium](https://emodnet.ec.europa.eu/en/bathymetry) - **Overture Maps Foundation** (auxiliary building footprint side-channel for the BDOT10k height cascade) — [Overture](https://overturemaps.org/) ### Special Demand Statistics - **Airport Passenger Statistics** (terminal-level annual passengers) — [ULC / Urząd Lotnictwa Cywilnego](https://ulc.gov.pl/pl/statystyki-analizy) - **Passenger-Ferry Terminal Statistics** (per-port annual passenger throughput — coastal bundles only: Świnoujście / Gdynia / Gdańsk-Westerplatte / Hel) — [Actia Forum Port Monitor](https://www.actiaforum.pl/) · [Zarząd Morskiego Portu Gdynia](https://www.port.gdynia.pl/) · [Zarząd Morskich Portów Szczecin i Świnoujście](https://www.port.szczecin.pl/) · [Polferries](https://polferries.pl/) · [Żegluga Gdańska](https://www.zegluga.pl/) - **University Registry** (POL-on institutional metadata: name, address, system type) — [POL-on](https://radon.nauka.gov.pl/) - **University Enrollment** (per-institution higher-education student headcount) — [GUS Higher Education](https://stat.gov.pl/obszary-tematyczne/edukacja/) - **University Geocoding** (GUGiK postal-address geocoding service for institutional addresses) — [GUGiK CAPAP / UUG](https://www.gugik.gov.pl/) - **Tourism Visitor Statistics** (POT annual ~960-attraction roll-up) — [Polska Organizacja Turystyczna](https://www.pot.gov.pl/) - **Football League Attendance** (Ekstraklasa) — [ekstraklasa.org](https://www.ekstraklasa.org/) - **Ice Hockey League Attendance** (PHL — _Polska Hokej Liga_) — [phl.pl](https://www.phl.pl/) - **Volleyball League Attendance** (PlusLiga) — [plusliga.pl](https://www.plusliga.pl/) - **Handball League Attendance** (Superliga) — [pgnig-superliga.pl](https://www.pgnig-superliga.pl/) - **Convention & Exhibition Centers** (PIPT-tracked venues) — [Polska Izba Przemysłu Targowego](https://www.pipt.pl/) - **Hospital Registry & Bed Statistics** (RPWDL medical-entity registry for facility addresses; GUS BDL health-sector bed-occupancy and outpatient rates) — [dane.gov.pl](https://dane.gov.pl/) · [GUS BDL](https://bdl.stat.gov.pl/) - **Military Installations** (Polish Armed Forces garrison roster — active-duty personnel curated from official unit references and public sources; installation locations geocoded via OpenStreetMap `landuse=military` footprints and GUGiK CAPAP address geocoding) — [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) · [GUGiK CAPAP](https://www.gugik.gov.pl/) ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-eu-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
